# Research - 2026-06-24

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> 2-day delta on 2026-06-22. Three NEW items, all from opencode's
> 06-24 batch. #33596 maps to `mcp/client.ts:382-392` getAllTools()
> with ZERO server-name composition: two MCP servers exposing a
> tool named `read` silently collide on dispatch. #33576 maps to
> `cli/tui/dialogs/FilePicker.tsx:84-91` eager unbounded recursive
> readdir on mount with no abort or pacing -- a node_modules tree
> blocks Ink first-paint. #33580 N/A (we use plain paths already).
> kilocode 06-23/24 was sandbox+routed-model TUI badges; no surface
> overlap. aider broke 30-day silence with Opus 4.7 model list;
> claude-code still 100% CHANGELOG noise (#772 still pending).

## Executive Summary

- **opencode #33596 -> Item #1 (~3h)**: `mcp/client.ts:382-392`
  pushes raw `tool.name` from every connected server into one
  flat list. Two servers exposing `read` collide; first-registered
  wins. opencode added `serverName.replaceAll(':', '%3A')` +
  `${server}::${tool}` composition.
- **opencode #33576 -> Item #2 (~3h)**: `FilePicker.tsx:84-91`
  `listFiles(rootDir, MAX_DEPTH=5)` runs eagerly inside the mount
  effect with no throttle, abort, or batch yield. On monorepos
  with deep node_modules, Ink first paint blocks for seconds.
- **Item #3 (~2h)**: docs-only. `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` MCP section
  never spells out the namespacing contract. Add an "MCP tool key
  composition" subsection so Item #1 becomes load-bearing.
- **Carryover**: `auto-implement` label pipeline RECOVERED (31
  closed PRs in 7d incl. #831/829/839). #772 demote-claude-code
  still pending -- this week 9/9 claude-code commits were
  `CHANGELOG.md`.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Namespace MCP tools by serverName to prevent collisions (Category: mcp, ~3h)

- **What**: In `src/mcp/client.ts`, extend `mapToolInfo()` (line
  133) to set `qualifiedName = ${escapedServer}::${tool.name}`
  where `escapedServer = serverName.replaceAll('%', '%25')
  .replaceAll(':', '%3A')`. Update `getAllTools()` (line 382) to
  expose `qualifiedName` and `callTool()` (line 478) to split on
  the LAST `::` so tool names containing `::` survive. Add
  `getToolByQualifiedName(qualified)` that reverses the escape.
  Test: register two mock servers both exposing `read`; assert
  distinct dispatch.
- **Why**: `getAllTools()` pushes raw `tool.name`, silently
  overwriting on collision. MCP is explicitly multi-server. With
  the v1 SDK bump (opencode #33593, restore legacy tool names),
  upstream servers ship overlapping `read`/`list`/`search` names.
  Land the namespacing BEFORE MCP tools wire into the agent loop
  (today only `cli/interactive.ts` consumes them).
- **Source**: sst/opencode#33596 (commit `6c12c32`, 2026-06-24,
  `+3 -1`, mcp/catalog.ts) + sst/opencode#33593 (`947e001`,
  legacy tool names).
- **Category**: mcp. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 2. Throttle and abort FilePicker directory walk (Category: tool, ~3h)

- **What**: Extract `listFiles()` from `FilePicker.tsx:25-55` into
  `src/cli/tui/dialogs/filePicker-domain.ts`. Add (a) `AbortSignal`
  parameter, (b) `setImmediate` yield every 50 entries to let Ink
  paint, (c) 200ms throttle on `setAllFiles` so quick `cd` typing
  does not pile promises. On unmount, abort. Test: mount,
  immediately unmount, assert no state updates after the unmount
  tick (vitest fake timers + `act`).
- **Why**: `FilePicker.tsx:84-91` calls `listFiles(rootDir,
  rootDir, 5, defaultExclude)` synchronously inside `useEffect`,
  awaiting full recursive readdir before `setIsLoading(false)`.
  On a monorepo (this repo has 600+ files under `dist/`), Ink
  blocks first paint for seconds and racing mounts leak
  state-after-unmount warnings.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#33576 (commit `6298db7`, 2026-06-24,
  `+124 -8`, directory-picker-domain.ts).
- **Category**: tool. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 3. Document MCP tool-key composition contract (Category: config, ~2h)

- **What**: Add an "MCP tool key composition" subsection to
  `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` after the existing MCP overview. Spell
  out: (a) qualified key is `${escapedServer}::${tool}`, (b)
  `serverName` escapes `%` then `:`, (c) callers split on the
  LAST `::` so tool names containing `::` survive, (d) display
  name strips the prefix only for UI, never for routing. Link
  forward from Item #1's commit.
- **Why**: Without a documented contract, Item #1's escape rule
  drifts the moment a second consumer of `getAllTools()` lands.
  Same pattern that bit us in #839 (streaming-error contract):
  code-only fixes regress without docs lock-in.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#33596 (commit `6c12c32`, 2026-06-24).
- **Category**: config. **Size**: small (~2h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Order**: #1 (3h, correctness) -> #2 (3h, UX) -> #3 (2h,
   doc lock-in). #1 + #3 ship together. #2 is parallelizable.
2. **Label hygiene**: `auto-implement` pipeline recovered (31
   closures in 7d). #772 still pending after 4 briefs -- this
   week 9/9 claude-code commits were `CHANGELOG.md`.
3. **Pre-emptive risk**: Item #1 fixes a latent bug whose blast
   radius grows when MCP tools wire into the agent loop. Land
   before that wiring or expect a silent regression.
